codeReview.summary: Reviewed commit 8abfe03 against the feature description/expected behavior and validation contract coverage for VAL-SHR-001..012 plus VAL-CROSS-005 touchpoints. The implementation changes (2-relay preset alignment, Profile Password info icon, and dual-status chips for Member #1) are correctly applied and consistent with the shared-flow screen expectations; no actionable code defects were found in this feature diff.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The ui-builder skill prescribes strict TDD order (write tests first and confirm failure before implementation), but this worker flow implemented code edits before creating the new screen test file. This recurring mismatch suggests the procedure is stricter than actual worker behavior and may need clarification or enforcement guidance.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Skill requirement: `.factory/skills/ui-builder/SKILL.md:51-75`. Transcript skeleton for session `835f2456-9575-404b-a68d-e8df1fb18107` shows `Edit` calls to `src/components/ui.tsx`, `src/styles/global.css`, and `src/screens/CreateProfileScreen.tsx` before `Create` of `src/screens/__tests__/CreateProfileScreen.test.tsx`.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Paper path guidance can be ambiguous for numbered shared-flow folders; worker initially looked up a non-existent path and had to rediscover the actual numbered directory structure.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: AGENTS guidance uses generic `igloo-paper/screens/{flow}/{screen}/screen.html` (`/Users/plebdev/.factory/missions/78b31ed8-f90b-4b78-a67f-c8ed021439db/AGENTS.md:58`), while transcript skeleton shows `LS` failure for `/Users/plebdev/Desktop/igloo-web-v2-prototype/igloo-paper/screens/shared/create-profile`; actual directories are numbered (`.../screens/shared/2-create-profile`, etc.).

summary: Feature review passed. Commit 8abfe03 implements the requested shared create-profile fidelity updates without introducing actionable defects in the reviewed scope; two shared-state observations were recorded for skill/process clarity.
